children.text: identifies the number of requests received under (as added by section 1005 of this Act), the average review time for such requests, the number of requests granted and denied under such section, and, for each of the requests denied under such section, the basis for such denial;section 826(h) of this title
describes the coordination between the Drug Enforcement Administration and Food and Drug Administration on efforts to prevent or alleviate drug shortages; and
identifies drugs containing a controlled substance subject to when such a drug is determined by the Secretary to be in shortage.section 826 of this title
